metadata.title: Universal Agent
metadata.description: Flexible AI assistant with specialized skills

UniversalAgent.title: Universal AI Workspace
UniversalAgent.subtitle: Turn vague ideas into research, interviews, and report outputs with a skill-extensible workflow.
UniversalAgent.landingQuestion: What can I do for you?
UniversalAgent.composerPlaceholder: Describe the job to be done, e.g. Analyze 2026 North America coffee market opportunities and suggest actions.
UniversalAgent.composerHint: Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for newline
UniversalAgent.quickPromptStudy: Run a competitive landscape scan for a new consumer brand.
UniversalAgent.quickPromptInterview: Create an interview guide about breakfast decisions of young moms.
UniversalAgent.quickPromptReport: Convert this discussion into a one-page executive summary.
UniversalAgent.quickPromptIdeas: Give me 5 testable product positioning directions.
UniversalAgent.skillPanelDescription: Upload your custom skill bundle to expand this workspace's execution capability.
UniversalAgent.capabilityResearchDesc: Decompose vague questions into actionable research tasks and keep progressing.
UniversalAgent.capabilityInterviewDesc: Coordinate persona interviews and track key agreements and conflicts.
UniversalAgent.capabilityReportDesc: Turn process results into readable and shareable report artifacts.
UniversalAgent.capabilitySkillDesc: Plug in domain-specific skills so AI workflows fit your business context.
UniversalAgent.newChatPrompt: What would you like to talk about?
UniversalAgent.inputPlaceholder: Type your message... (Shift+Enter for new line)
UniversalAgent.executionSelectTask: Select a sub-agent task to view execution progress.
UniversalAgent.executionSubAgentNotReady: Sub-agent chat is not available yet.
UniversalAgent.executionWaitingFirstStep: Sub-agent is running. Waiting for the first milestone...
UniversalAgent.executionNoSteps: No execution steps found for this task.
